## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — code change without new feature or bug fix
- [ ] test — adding or updating tests
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — build, config, dependencies

## Test plan

- [ ] `npm test` passes (all unit tests green)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes with 0 errors
- [ ] Manually tested in Chrome (voice recording, AI generation, copy output)
- [ ] New code has tests (TDD — 80%+ coverage)
